title: AliveCor - Personal ECG Device
problem: ECG monitoring requires clinic visits, limiting access and timeliness of arrhythmia diagnosis.
solution: KardiaMobile - FDA-cleared personal ECG device with AI interpretation, smartphone-connected for anywhere monitoring.
technology: Mobile ECG hardware, AI arrhythmia detection algorithms, smartphone integration
ai_type: AI for arrhythmia detection and classification
varden_fit: Moderate - Consumer-to-provider referral opportunity. Could integrate into Varden for routing detected arrhythmias to cardiologists.
notes: Pioneer in personal ECG. Strong consumer adoption. Referral pathway to cardiology is key.
